speaker: SFX

speaker: MEERA
motion_prompt: Blushing, eyes half-closed, she whispers sweet nothings to the bowl.

speaker: SFX
motion_prompt: Footsteps. She startles, hides the bowl behind her back — way too casual.

speaker: RAJ
vo_line: Yeh… kisse baatein ho rahi thi?

speaker: MEERA
motion_prompt: Raj plucks the bowl out — aloo bhindi revealed. Meera throws her hands up, caught.

speaker: RAJ
vo_line: Ab… main bhi iske pyaar mein.
